dataset_b: juricode-jp (Phase 1 expanded 3rd wave: 11,758 articles across 43 statutes including phase3-pharma)

phase_distribution.note: Sum is 11,659 - actual file count is 11,758 due to count discrepancy in 2 statutes; using validate-all reported 11,760 as canonical

eval_set_version: v0.2 (137 samples: 8 own + 129 from Digital Agency lawqa_jp)

comparison_to_8_query_baseline.note: Adding 129 lawqa_jp questions (Digital Agency public benchmark, bar exam derived, hardware) plus 46.6% corpus expansion expectedly reduced metrics, since the new questions are harder and the corpus has more semantic neighbours competing as distractors.

comparison_to_world_benchmark_k5h_zenn_d.note: External benchmark using same lawqa_jp dataset but with 140-doc corpus (just the contexts themselves), 84x SMALLER than our 11,758-article corpus
comparison_to_world_benchmark_k5h_zenn_d.interpretation: Direct apple-to-apple comparison not valid because corpus sizes differ by 84x. Our test is significantly harder: full 11,758-article corpus introduces many semantic neighbours that don't exist in the 140-doc benchmark. A future 'restricted corpus' run on just the 13 lawqa-jp-referenced statutes' articles would enable a fair comparison.

key_findings: First benchmark on JuriCode-JP using a public, peer-recognized evaluation dataset (Digital Agency lawqa_jp, PDL 1.0)
Eval-set scaled 17.1x (8 -> 137) and corpus 3.12x (3,772 -> 11,758) in a single day
Confidence interval narrowed dramatically: 8 samples = +/-37%, 137 samples = +/-8.5%
Recall@10 = 75.2% on 11,758-article corpus is a meaningful real-world performance ceiling for Gemini single-vector retrieval
33 partial-match cases (Recall@3 = 68.6% beats Recall@1 = 57.7% by 11pp) suggest hybrid or re-rank approaches would lift Recall@1 substantially
PDL 1.0 license attribution to Digital Agency lawqa_jp is recorded in every converted eval-set entry
notes: First adoption of Digital Agency public evaluation dataset in JuriCode-JP - strategically significant (same agency as GENAI/Lawsy-Custom-BQ downstream)
129 of 140 lawqa_jp questions usable (10 PDF-only references excluded, 1 partial article-id match where context doesn't show '### 第30条の2' heading)
Article-ID extraction accuracy: 99.2% (128/129 entries have all expected articles found in corpus)
World benchmark by k5h (Zenn Dec 2025) used a 140-doc artificial corpus; our 11,758-article corpus is 84x larger and represents real RAG use
Eval-set v0.3 candidates: add JBE-QA (constitution/penal/civil from bar exam, CC BY 4.0, 3,464 entries), COLIEE Task 3 (civil code), and municipal-RAG-specific questions
